samples.xml_description:
<module id="pulse_detect">
    <description>Design a 1-bit pulse detection unit. The input signal data_in is triggered by clk. When data_in changes from 0 to 1 to 0 (3 cycles), it is considered a pulse. The indicating signal data_out is 1 at the end of the pulse, and returns to 0 until the next pulse.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="data_in">1-bit input signal.</input>
        <output id="data_out">Output signal indicating the presence of pulses.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="s_idle">Idle state.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s_1">First state.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s_2">Second state.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s_3">Third state.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="state">State register.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <always_comb>
            <case>
                <case_expression>state</case_expression>
                <case_item>
                    <case_value>Idle</case_value>
                    <if>
                        <if_condition>data_in == 0</if_condition>
                        <if_true>state = s_1</if_true>
                        <if_false>state = s_1</if_false>
                    </if>
                </case_item>
                <case_item>
                    <case_value>s_1</case_value>
                    <if>
                        <if_condition>data_in == 1</if_condition>
                        <if_true>state = s_2</if_true>
                        <if_false>state = s_1</if_false>
                    </if>
                </case_item>
                <case_item>
                    <case_value>s_2</case_value>
                    <if>
                        <if_condition>data_in == 0</if_condition>
                        <if_true>state = s_3</if_true>
                        <if_false>state = s_1</if_false>
                    </if>
                </case_item>
                <case_item>
                    <case_value>s_3</case_value>
                    <if>
                        <if_condition>data_in == 1</if_condition>
                        <if_true>state = s_2</if_true>
                        <if_false>state = s_1</if_false>
                    </if>
                </case_item>
                <case_item>
                    <case_value>default</case_value>
                    <assignment>state = s_1</assignment>
                </case_item>
            </case>
        </always_comb>
        <always_ff>
            <for>
                <for_loop>data_out</for_loop>
                <for_range>state</for_range>
                <for_body>
                    <case>
                        <case_expression>state</case_expression>
                        <case_item>
                            <case_value>Idle</case_value>
                            <if>
                                <if_condition>data_in == 0</if_condition>
                                <if_true>data_out = 0</if_true>
                                <if_false>data_out = 0</if_false>
                            </if>
                        </case_item>
                        <case_item>
                            <case_value>s_1</case_value>
                            <if>
                                <if_condition>data_in == 1</if_condition>
                                <if_true>data_out = 0</if_true>
                                <if_false>data_out = 0</if_false>
                            </if>
                        </case_item>
                        <case_item>
                            <case_value>s_2</case_value>
                            <if>
                                <if_condition>data_in == 0</if_condition>
                                <if_true>data_out = 1</if_true>
                                <if_false>data_out = 0</if_false>
                            </if>
                        </case_item>
                        <case_item>
                            <case_value>s_3</case_value>
                            <if>
                                <if_condition>data_in == 1</if_condition>
                                <if_true>data_out = 0</if_true>
                                <if_false>data_out = 0</if_false>
                            </if>
                        </case_item>
                        <case_item>
                            <case_value>default</case_value>
                            <assignment>data_out = 0</assignment>
                        </case_item>
                    </case>
                </for_body>
            </for>
        </always_ff>
    </implementation>
</module>
